info.name: GraphQL – Users Module
info.description: Root field `users`. Queries: user(uuid), users(limit,offset), userStats. Mutations: updateProfile, uploadAvatar, updateUser, promoteToAdmin, promoteToSuperAdmin. Set userId from Auth login (or use userUuid — same value). Admin/SuperAdmin gates apply per resolver.

request.description: Upload avatar. fileData: base64, URL, or file://.
Promote user to Admin. SuperAdmin only.
Promote user to SuperAdmin. SuperAdmin only.
